task_description: Phase 26: Universal AI Memory & Context Graph - expand memory schema to 8 categories, add access scopes and TTL, enforce anti-creep guarantees (explicit signal required), enhance context graph with typed edges, build memory inspector UI in QuantAI with full CRUD/export/import/disclosure, and validate all hard gates.

verification.summary: All 17 turbo tasks pass (typecheck, test, build, lint) across @quant/ai-memory (43 tests), @quant/identity-permissions (173 tests), @quant/quantai (155 tests). Total: 371 tests passing. Semantic review APPROVED on v3 pass.
